# external/libart — provenance

Vendored copy of upstream **libart** (Adaptive Radix Tree, C),
https://github.com/armon/libart — BSD-3-Clause, © Armon Dadgar.

Used ONLY by the benchmark/compare suite (`ARTPP_BENCHMARKS=ON`) as the
head-to-head ART baseline; the artpp library itself has no dependency on it.
Files are unmodified upstream `src/art.c` + `src/art.h`.
